events.description:

events.title: Extreme Cup Soccer Tournament
events.description: The Park City Extreme Cup Soccer Tournament is one of the largest sanctioned U.S. Youth Soccer tournament for boys and girls U9 through U19 in the State of Utah; U.S. Club Soccer teams are also eligible to participate.
events.location: Various locations through out Summit County and the Heber Valley

events.title: Miner's Day Celebration
events.description: The Miner's Day Celebration is the longest-running event in Park City and has been happening for over 130 years.
